impact: This advances the PP&D plan by making future lifecycle extractor proposals fail closed if they are broad generated modules, exceed 180 physical lines, or introduce dataclass-based implementation drift.
summary: Add a narrow replacement-size guard for the permit lifecycle requirements extractor.
target_task: Task checkbox-25: Add a one-file replacement-size guard test for `ppd.extraction.permit_lifecycle_requirements` proposals that rejects broad generated modules and requires the extractor implementation to stay under 180 physical lines with no dataclasses.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
